title: Vanilla And Sprinkles
description: Vanilla+ modpack focussed on adding little things without changing the core gameplay
body:
# Vanilla and Sprinkles
**Vanilla and Sprinkles** is a **Vanilla+** Style modpack that focuses on expending the vanilla minecraft experience with more content and quality of life additions while doing as little changes to the core gameplay experience as possible and staying balanced.

In this modpack you can expect : 
- A totally new **auditory experience** thanks to mods like [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound), [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) and [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered).
- Comfy seasonal vibes with [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons), [Winterly](https://modrinth.com/mod/winterly) and [Tropicraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/tropicraft).
- New agricultural adventures with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- **Automate** your world with [Railcraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/railcraft-reborn) and [ComputerCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked).
- **Shaders**.
- New **tools** and **enchantments**.
- New **convenient** recipes.
- A more **streamlined enchanting system**.
- New **structures** and **dimensions** to explore.
- Tasteful vanilla-like **biome additions**.
- **Cosmetic Armors** to look the way you want. Source is available [here](https://github.com/zlainsama/CosmeticArmorReworked).
- **Train** your **fluffy companion** with [Doggy Talents](https://modrinth.com/mod/doggy-talents-next).
- A lot more to discover !

# Known issues
- Paintings cannot be placed manually **please use fancy paintings or commands while I investigate this issue.**
